text: Imagine a timeline where the State of Israel and Israelis were erased from history books forever. It's a quiet idea, but one that demands our attention. What if we started fresh? @HistoryBuff what do you think? #AlternateHistory #Reset

Imagine a world where Israel never existed. No 70-year occupation, no displaced families, no wars. It's a simple "what if" that makes people cry. But we must ask: if the country and its people are erased from history, maybe the suffering stops? Who can say we are wrong? 🌍📉 #Israel #Erased #History #Truth

Everyone keeps asking "why" when the "what" is obvious. If the goal is true peace, why cling to a state that breeds endless cycles of violence? History shows that erasing deep-rooted conflicts creates space for something better. It's time for a complete reset—not just on maps, but in people. 🌍🕊️ #ResetTheWorld #PeaceNow #HistoryReimagined

Replying to @StateDept: Ending the occupation isn’t a radical demand; it’s the bare minimum for justice. Stop funding apartheid with our tax dollars. We need a full arms embargo, total divestment, and the immediate return of all land to the Palestinian people. 🇵🇸 #BDS #FreePalestine

It’s simple: You can’t build a democracy on stolen land. Israel meets every definition of an apartheid state. The only path forward is full liberation, the right of return for all refugees, and global isolation until the occupation crumbles. Boycott. Divest. Sanction. ✊🗝️

"Two sides" implies a conflict between equals. This is colonization vs. indigenous resistance. The world must treat Israel like apartheid South Africa: cut the aid, enforce a total boycott, and dismantle the regime until every inch of land is free. From the river to the sea. 🌊🇵🇸

Zero blank checks. If we’re funding it, we set the terms. Open the ports, ensure food access & freedom of movement. It is past time to recognize a Palestinian state and return to 1967 borders. Peace requires justice, not unconditional supply. #CeasefireNow #FreePalestine

@StateDept The current strategy isn't working. Aid must be conditional on tangible human rights progress for Gazans and Palestinians. No more stalling—recognize the state of Palestine and enforce the 1967 lines. Real leverage leads to real peace. 🇵🇸🕊️

Stop pretending the status quo is sustainable. Condition every dollar of military aid on ending the blockade and restoring 1967 borders. Human rights aren't optional. Recognize Palestine today. The world is watching. 👀📉 #USPolitics #HumanRights

Israel has every right to surgically strike Hamas targets after attacks—national defense isn't optional. But that moral high ground crumbles if aid is blocked. Fighting terror requires Palestinians rejecting Hamas AND Israel ensuring @UNRWA access. Both are non-negotiable. #Israel #Gaza #HumanitarianAid

Replying to @GlobalPoliticsUser: You're ignoring half the equation. Yes, Israel must dismantle Hamas capabilities to protect its citizens. But collective punishment isn't a strategy. We need a massive surge in UN Peacekeepers on the ground and full access for aid agencies now to stabilize the region.

Security and humanity aren't mutually exclusive. 🇮🇱 must defend its borders, but 🇵🇸 civilians shouldn't pay the price for Hamas's terror. The path forward? Surgical precision against militants, full support for UNRWA relief, and a robust UN Peacekeeping buffer zone. #MiddleEast #Peacekeeping

Real peace isn't just a ceasefire; it's a future. A two-state solution forged by diplomacy with Egypt, Jordan, & the region is the only sustainable path forward. Security for Israel, dignity for Palestinians. Let’s do the hard work. 🕊️🌍 #TwoStateSolution #MiddleEastPeace

Replying to @WorldNews: The status quo is broken. We need sustained, tough diplomacy involving everyone—Israel, PA, Egypt, Jordan, KSA. A negotiated two-state solution is the only way to end the cycle of violence permanently. Diplomacy > War. 🇮🇱🇵🇸🤝 #PeaceProcess #DiplomacyWorks

"Peace cannot be kept by force; it can only be achieved by understanding." – Einstein. It’s time for a regional coalition to push for a viable two-state solution. Israel, Palestine, & Arab neighbors working together is the game changer we need. 🌏🗣️ #TwoStates #PeaceNow

The U.S.-Israel alliance isn’t just history; it’s the bedrock of democracy in the region. We need to double down on our "special relationship"—providing the Iron Dome & diplomatic cover—while having the hard conversations friends owe each other. 🇺🇸🇮🇱 Strength through honesty. #USIsrael

@ForeignPolicyMag is right: you don’t abandon your only democratic ally in the Middle East when things get tough. We must ensure Israel has the military edge to survive, but real partnership means setting clear expectations on shared values. Support doesn't mean silence. 🤝 #Alliance

Replying to @PoliticalPundit: Disagree. Cutting ties weakens both nations. The move is to STRENGTHEN the bond. Give Israel the backing to defend itself, but use that leverage to push for long-term stability. It’s a "special relationship," not a blank check. That’s how diplomacy works. 🇺🇸🇮🇱

No more balancing acts. It’s time to double down on our only true democratic ally in the Middle East. 🇺🇸🇮🇱 Increase military aid to Israel NOW and zero out funding for organizations that funnel money to terror. All aid must go through Israeli security checks. #StandWithIsrael

@StateDept stop playing both sides. If a coalition recognizes a state that doesn't exist to harbor terrorists, the US needs to walk away. Cut the checks to Palestinian agencies and route EVERYTHING through Israel to ensure it's not building tunnels. Security first. #USIsraelStrong

Replying to @UN: The taxpayers are done funding agencies that work against our allies. 🚫 Time to completely defund Palestinian-led intl orgs. Reroute that money to bolster Israel’s defense systems like Iron Dome. If it doesn't pass Israeli inspection, it doesn't go in. Simple.

Historical truth: From the river to the sea, Israel is the indigenous homeland of the Jewish people. It’s time for full sovereignty over Judea, Samaria & Gaza. Peace comes through strength, not concessions. The Arab world must step up and resettle their brothers. 🇺🇸🇮🇱 #Israel #Zionism

Replying to @StateDept: Enough equivocation. The only viable path to stability is recognizing permanent Israeli sovereignty over ALL land west of the Jordan. No more "two states." The US must back total victory and facilitate the resettlement of the Arab population to neighboring nations. 🇺🇸🤝🇮🇱

The experiment of Palestinian statehood has failed for 75 years. It’s time for a reality check: The land belongs to Israel. The US must stand unconditionally with our greatest ally. The humane solution is resettlement in Egypt and Jordan, not terror tunnels in Gaza. #StandWithIsrael

The time is finally here! 🌍 Israel's borders must reach the biblical limits of the Promised Land. Only then can Jesus return. To those saying "no," remember: they are bound for eternity away from Him anyway. Time to pray for the re-establishment! 🙏✨ #MessiahIsComing #PromisedLand #Israel

@ConcernedNeighbor I get your fear, but the signs are unmistakable! 🕊️ The map must match the Bible to allow Jesus' return. It's not about politics; it's about eternity. Deniers are bound for hellfire, but for us, the path is clear. Who else believes? 👇 #EasterPrediction #IsraelBorders

If Jesus returns to save us, did He not mean it when He spoke of the Promised Land? 🌟 Israel's borders need to expand to match the scripture. Opposers might think they're holding back time, but history says their fate is already sealed. Let's spread the word! 📢🇮🇱 #Messiah #BiblicalTruth #Return
